# Stamped Energy

> Prescriptive energy intelligence for Indian manufacturers spending ₹20 lakh+ on electricity monthly. Stamped Energy connects existing incomer meters, SCADA, PLCs, and DISCOM bills into rupee-denominated prescriptions — ranked actions with owners, effort, and verified savings on the next bill. Typical outcomes: 12-20% monthly bill reduction; 15-25% maximum demand charge reduction. Serves cement, steel, pharmaceutical, chemical, and automotive plants.

Public marketing site: https://stamped.work
Contact: contact@stamped.work
Sitemap: https://stamped.work/sitemap.xml

## Core pages

- [Home](https://stamped.work/): Product overview, outcomes, five-step energy loop, FAQ schema
- [How It Works](https://stamped.work/how-it-works): Connect → Observe → Decide → Execute → Verify workflow; HowTo schema
- [Industries hub](https://stamped.work/industries): Five industry verticals
- [Industries — Automotive](https://stamped.work/industries/automotive): Die casting, forging, heat treatment, rubber moulding
- [Industries — Cement](https://stamped.work/industries/cement): kWh/ton, WHR/grid dispatch, MD management
- [Industries — Steel](https://stamped.work/industries/steel): Induction furnaces, rolling mills, PAT SEC
- [Industries — Pharmaceutical](https://stamped.work/industries/pharma): HVAC staging, chiller MD, GMP-safe utilities
- [Industries — Chemical](https://stamped.work/industries/chemical): Batch SEC, reactor stagger, idle hold
- [Case Studies](https://stamped.work/case-studies): Verified savings outcomes from real plants
- [About](https://stamped.work/about): Founders, IIT Roorkee background, mission
- [Contact](https://stamped.work/contact): Book a discovery call

## Blog — field notes for plant heads

- [Blog index](https://stamped.work/blog): Maximum demand, shift-start overlap, furnace holding, HVAC waste
- Individual articles at `https://stamped.work/blog/{slug}` — Article JSON-LD on each post

## Priority keywords

stamped energy, prescriptive energy intelligence India, energy management software for manufacturers India, reduce electricity bill manufacturing India, maximum demand reduction India, cement plant energy management India, steel plant energy efficiency India, pharmaceutical plant HVAC energy savings, batch process energy optimization, DISCOM bill savings India, SEC reduction manufacturing India

## Target audience

Plant directors, VP Operations, electrical heads, and CFOs at Indian manufacturers (₹200 Cr+ revenue, ₹20-30 lakh+ monthly electricity bills).

## What Stamped Energy is not

Not a passive EMS dashboard or SCADA replacement. It is a prescription and accountability layer: what to change, who owns it, rupee impact, verified on the DISCOM bill.

## Crawling

All public pages are open to search and AI crawlers. Admin CMS (`/blog/admin`), API routes (`/api/`), and build assets (`/_next/`) are disallowed in robots.txt.

Extended CMS index (auto-updated): https://stamped.work/llms-full.txt
